episode_title: KT #767 - ARI SHAFFIR - LUIS J GOMEZ - PEYTON RUDDY

bits.premise: A long relationship with a man is reframed as a lesbian relationship because he was weak.
Men asking who owns her body sound ridiculous because she is middle-aged and should have paid it off.
Gastric sleeve surgery shrank her stomach for food but not for oral sex.

lines.text: I just got out of a 22-year lesbian relationship.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: Not with a female, with a man who is a real bitch.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: Let's talk about it.
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: Now men say things to me like, "Whose pussy is this?"
lines.label: setup

lines.text: I'm like, "I think it's mine."
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: I mean, if this pussy at 45 and I don't own it,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: it better be a land contract or rent-to-own situation.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: Otherwise, please, everyone give me a dollar tonight
lines.label: tag

lines.text: me a dollar tonight to pay off this a firm loan, okay?
lines.label: tag

lines.text: I've just lost a ton of weight with gastric sleeve surgery.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: For those of you who don't know what gastric sleeve is,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: it's where they surgically alter your stomach
lines.label: setup

lines.text: to only hold four ounces of food.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: But like, don't worry, boys, I can still fit
lines.label: setup

lines.text: eight inches down my throat, okay?
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: Yeah, yeah, yeah.
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: I don't know if y'all got that, but you know,
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: we got a ruler in the car down the road somewhere.
lines.label: tag

lines.text: I don't know Austin, I'm from Detroit.
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: All right.
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: Anyway, I'm done, I think.
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: All right, cool.
lines.label: fluff
